note: Speaker notes live in a NotesSlidePart paired with the slide. Add creates the part if absent; Set replaces text.

direction.description: Reading direction for the notes body. Sets <a:pPr rtl="1"/> on every paragraph and rtlCol="1" on the body shape's bodyPr. Required for Arabic / Hebrew speaker notes.

lang.description: BCP-47 language tag applied to every run in the notes body (a:rPr/@lang). Mirrors the shape Set vocabulary.
